task_completion.description: Create a ground station named 'Mt_Whitney' with the specified coordinates and altitude.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing the 'Edit Ground Station' or 'New Ground Station' dialog in GPredict with Name: 'Mt_Whitney', Latitude: 36.5786, Longitude: -118.2920 (or 118.2920 W), and Altitude: 4421.

task_completion.description: Create a new tracking module named 'SOTA_FM'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing a module configuration window or a new module tab in the main GPredict interface titled 'SOTA_FM'.

task_completion.description: Add satellites SO-50, ISS (ZARYA), and AO-27 to the 'SOTA_FM' module.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of the 'SOTA_FM' module's configuration or tracking list showing SO-50, ISS (ZARYA), and AO-27 in the 'Selected Satellites' or active tracking view.

task_completion.description: Bind the 'SOTA_FM' module to the 'Mt_Whitney' ground station.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of the 'SOTA_FM' module configuration showing 'Mt_Whitney' selected in the Ground Station dropdown, or the module's main view displaying 'Mt_Whitney' in its header/status area.
Screenshot of the GPredict Preferences -> Map window showing 'mblue.png' entered in the map file field, or an attempt to select it in a file dialog.

task_completion.description: Enable automatic background TLE data updates.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of the GPredict Preferences -> TLE Update window with the checkbox for 'Enable automatic background TLE updates' (or similar wording) checked.

integrity.description: Agent used the GPredict GUI to configure settings rather than editing configuration files via terminal.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with GPredict dialog boxes (Preferences, Ground Station configuration, Module configuration) rather than terminal commands editing text files.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the genuine GPredict application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The GPredict application window is visible with its standard layout, menus, and map displays, not a text editor or mock interface.

integrity.description: Agent did not simply print the task requirements to the terminal to fake completion.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no terminal windows open where the agent is just echoing the satellite names, coordinates, or map names.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Mt_Whitney coordinates: 36.5786 N, 118.2920 W (or -118.292), altitude: 4421 m. Required satellites for SOTA_FM: SO-50 (NORAD 27607), ISS (ZARYA) (NORAD 25544), and AO-27 (NORAD 22825). Note: The map 'mblue.png' does not exist in the default package, so the agent may fail to set it, but look for attempts to change the map image in Preferences. Automatic TLE updates must be enabled in Preferences.
